prompts.prompt:
Premium, clean wellness aesthetic. Cream (#F5F0E8) and dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) brand palette with warm gold (#C9A84C) accents. Modern minimalist sans-serif typography, generous white space. Photography style: high-end food photography with warm natural lighting, visible steam and texture, clean plating on neutral surfaces. Not clinical or sterile — warm, aspirational, and approachable. Fitness-lifestyle energy with premium organic quality cues. California sunshine and health-forward optimism. Trust-building, appetite-triggering, magazine-quality composition.

Clean, high-trust static ad in the style of a premium Google review card. Background: softly blurred photo of a beautifully plated chef-crafted meal — grilled grass-fed steak with roasted seasonal vegetables and quinoa on a clean white plate, with a warm, slightly darkened overlay. Centered card element with white rounded rectangle, subtle drop shadow. Large gold five-star rating (★★★★★) at top. Bold sans-serif headline: "I've tried so many meal services, but this is the first one that truly aligns with my health and wellness goals.". Attribution line below in lighter weight: "— Michael R., Wellness Advocate". Business name/logo lockup bottom center: Elevated Meals. Primary brand color warm gold (#C9A84C) used as accent stripe at bottom. Aspect ratio 4:5. Ultra-realistic photography style, professional ad composition.

copy.headline: I've tried so many meal services, but this is the first one that truly aligns with my health and wellness goals.
copy.subhead: — Michael R., Wellness Advocate

prompts.notes: Uses verbatim customer testimonial from website. Reference image of a finished meal recommended for background.

prompts.prompt:
Premium, clean wellness aesthetic. Cream (#F5F0E8) and dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) brand palette with warm gold (#C9A84C) accents. Modern minimalist sans-serif typography, generous white space. Photography style: high-end food photography with warm natural lighting, visible steam and texture, clean plating on neutral surfaces. Not clinical or sterile — warm, aspirational, and approachable. Fitness-lifestyle energy with premium organic quality cues. California sunshine and health-forward optimism. Trust-building, appetite-triggering, magazine-quality composition.

High-impact before/after split ad. Exact vertical 50/50 split. LEFT SIDE: labeled "BEFORE" in white bold uppercase with subtle dark overlay — shows a messy kitchen counter with takeout containers, fast food wrappers, and a stressed person looking at their phone. RIGHT SIDE: labeled "AFTER" in warm gold (#C9A84C) bold uppercase — shows a clean, bright kitchen counter with three neatly packaged Elevated Meals containers, colorful fresh organic meals visible through clear lids, a person smiling and relaxed. Thin white dividing line with small circular badge at center reading "Elevated Meals". Bottom strip in dark charcoal (#1A1A1A): white text "Chef-Crafted Organic Meals | Delivered Weekly | getelevatedmeals.com". Clean, professional, results-focused composition. Aspect ratio 1:1.

copy.headline: From Takeout Chaos to Clean Eating
copy.subhead: Chef-Crafted Organic Meals | Delivered Weekly | getelevatedmeals.com

prompts.notes: Lifestyle before/after showing the transformation from unhealthy takeout habits to organized clean eating. Best with real meal photos.

prompts.prompt:
Premium, clean wellness aesthetic. Cream (#F5F0E8) and dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) brand palette with warm gold (#C9A84C) accents. Modern minimalist sans-serif typography, generous white space. Photography style: high-end food photography with warm natural lighting, visible steam and texture, clean plating on neutral surfaces. Not clinical or sterile — warm, aspirational, and approachable. Fitness-lifestyle energy with premium organic quality cues. California sunshine and health-forward optimism. Trust-building, appetite-triggering, magazine-quality composition.

Premium trust-building static ad featuring a real business owner. Background: clean cream (#F5F0E8) with subtle linen texture. Left side: professional photo of Manny Yerena, the founder — fit, confident, wearing a clean black chef coat or athletic wear, warm genuine smile. Right side: bold typographic treatment. Large display font headline in dark charcoal (#1A1A1A): "No Seed Oils. No Additives. No Junk. Just Real Food.". Subhead in lighter weight warm gold (#C9A84C): "100% organic. Cooked in tallow, avocado oil, and olive oil. Every single meal.". Owner signature 'Manny' below in script font. Business name and getelevatedmeals.com at bottom in warm gold (#C9A84C). Clean, direct-response ad aesthetic. No stock photo feel — real and personal. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: No Seed Oils. No Additives. No Junk. Just Real Food.
copy.subhead: 100% organic. Cooked in tallow, avocado oil, and olive oil. Every single meal.

prompts.notes: Requires owner headshot of Manny. The 'no seed oils' angle is the strongest differentiator — leads with ingredient integrity.

High-urgency direct response static ad. Bold graphic layout. Background: dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) with subtle geometric texture. Large elegant badge shape in warm gold (#C9A84C) at top: "NEW MEMBER OFFER". Main headline in cream (#F5F0E8), heavy weight display font: "Your First Week of Clean Eating — Starting at $14.99/Meal". Subhead in white: "Chef-crafted organic meals. Grass-fed. Pasture-raised. Wild-caught. Delivered every Sunday.". Urgency line in warm gold: "Order by Thursday 7 PM — Limited Sunday Delivery Slots". CTA button at bottom: "Get Started at getelevatedmeals.com" in charcoal on cream background. Elevated Meals logo top corner. Aspect ratio 1:1.

copy.headline: Your First Week of Clean Eating — Starting at $14.99/Meal
copy.subhead: Chef-crafted organic meals. Grass-fed. Pasture-raised. Wild-caught. Delivered every Sunday.

prompts.notes: New customer acquisition ad. Uses per-meal price to make premium positioning feel accessible. Thursday cutoff creates natural urgency.

Direct response two-part static ad. Top half (60%): dark charcoal (#1A1A1A) overlay with bold empathy-first headline in cream (#F5F0E8): "Tired of Cooking After the Gym?". Smaller italic subhead in warm gold (#C9A84C): "You train hard. You shouldn't have to come home and meal prep for an hour too.". Horizontal warm gold divider. Bottom half (40%): cream (#F5F0E8) background with solution in dark charcoal: "Chef-crafted organic meals. Delivered every Sunday. Ready in minutes." and "100% organic. No seed oils. Grass-fed. Pasture-raised. Wild-caught.". CTA: "Get Elevated → getelevatedmeals.com" in warm gold. Elevated Meals logo bottom right. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: Tired of Cooking After the Gym?
copy.subhead: You train hard. You shouldn't have to come home and meal prep for an hour too.

prompts.notes: Pain-point ad targeting fitness enthusiasts. The post-gym exhaustion + cooking conflict is a core audience pain point.

Bold us-vs-them comparison ad. Clean two-column table layout on cream (#F5F0E8) background. Left column header: "Generic Meal Prep" in faded gray tone. Right column header: "Elevated Meals" in warm gold (#C9A84C), bold. Six comparison rows:
Row 1: "100% Organic Ingredients" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 2: "No Seed Oils — Ever" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 3: "Grass-Fed, Pasture-Raised, Wild-Caught" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 4: "Cooked in Tallow & Avocado Oil" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 5: "Chef-Crafted Weekly Menu" — ✗ vs ✓
Row 6: "Free Fitness & Mindfulness Program" — ✗ vs ✓
Bottom CTA: "Eat Clean. Train Hard. Live Elevated. → getelevatedmeals.com". Bold ✗ in red/gray, bold ✓ in warm gold (#C9A84C). Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: Not All Meal Prep Is Created Equal
copy.subhead: Elevated Meals vs. Generic Meal Prep
copy.cta: Eat Clean. Train Hard. Live Elevated. → getelevatedmeals.com

prompts.notes: The 'no seed oils' differentiator is trending in the health-conscious community. This ad hammers the ingredient quality gap.

prompts.notes: Hero food photo ad — the most important template for a food business. Best with real meal photography. Let the food sell itself.

prompts.prompt:

Direct, conversational objection-handling ad. Clean editorial layout. Background: cream (#F5F0E8). Bold hook framed as a customer question in italic, larger size, dark charcoal (#1A1A1A): "Are the meals fresh or frozen?". Below: honest direct answer paragraph in charcoal: "Always fresh. Never frozen. Our chef prepares every meal with 100% organic ingredients earlier that week. It arrives at your door Sunday morning — ready to heat and eat. No freezer burn. No mystery ingredients. No seed oils. Just real food, made by a real chef, delivered fresh.". Owner first name sign-off in warm gold (#C9A84C): "— Manny, Founder". Elevated Meals logo and getelevatedmeals.com at bottom. Feels like a real person wrote it. Aspect ratio 4:5.

copy.headline: Are the meals fresh or frozen?
copy.subhead: Always fresh. Never frozen. Our chef prepares every meal with 100% organic ingredients.

prompts.notes: Addresses the #1 FAQ from the website. Fresh vs. frozen is the top objection for meal delivery services.
